# MoonlightWeb

> MoonlightWeb is a free, open-source (GPL-3.0), self-hosted game-streaming server
> that turns any device with a web browser into a Sunshine / GameStream client.
> Nothing to install on the client — just a URL.

## What it does

- Streams a gaming PC (running [Sunshine](https://github.com/LizardByte/Sunshine))
  to any browser: phone, tablet, laptop, TV.
- Up to 4K HDR at up to 240 fps, with H264, HEVC and AV1 codecs (hardware-decoded
  via WebCodecs).
- Under 20 ms latency over Wi-Fi using a WebRTC UDP transport with automatic
  fallback (UDP → TCP → WSS).
- GPU Video Enhancement in the browser (WebGPU running SGSRv1 + FSR1): stream at
  720p, display near-1440p quality.
- Full input support: keyboard, pointer-lock mouse, multi-touch trackpad, virtual
  keyboard, Xbox and PlayStation controllers with rumble.
- Zero-config: Sunshine hosts are auto-discovered on the LAN via mDNS, paired with
  a PIN.
- One-click Internet access: personal sub-domain ({you}.moonlightweb.top), free
  auto-renewed TLS certificate, UPnP port mapping.

## How it works

A small C++/Qt server runs on the gaming PC next to Sunshine. It embeds
moonlight-common-c, speaks the GameStream protocol (RTSP/RTP/ENet) to Sunshine,
and relays video/audio/input to browsers over WebRTC. The client is 100% web:
WebCodecs for decoding, WebGPU for rendering, AudioWorklet for Opus audio.

## Platforms (server)

- Windows x64 / arm64 (guided installer)
- macOS Apple Silicon (DMG)
- Linux x64 (.deb, .rpm, portable AppImage)

The client requires no install: any modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Safari, Firefox).

## Links

- Website: https://moonlightweb.top/
- FAQ: https://moonlightweb.top/faq.html
- Contact: https://moonlightweb.top/contact.html
- Install guides (pick your platform): https://moonlightweb.top/guides/
- Install on Windows: https://moonlightweb.top/guides/windows.html
- Install on macOS: https://moonlightweb.top/guides/macos.html
- Install on Linux: https://moonlightweb.top/guides/linux.html
- Source code & downloads: https://github.com/linckosz/moonlight-web
- Latest releases: https://github.com/linckosz/moonlight-web/releases
- Sunshine (host software): https://github.com/LizardByte/Sunshine
- Author: Bruno Martin — support: https://buymeacoffee.com/brunoocto
